items.title: [正面] #1 Gacha Game severely monetized in all aspects, b...
items.summary:
#1 Gacha Game severely monetized in all aspects, but also generous in basic pulls rewards if you put the time in.

#2 Very similar to "Reverse 1999", with "Slay the Spire"'ish combat. Virtual novel storytelling with Slay the spire map and combat.

#3 Combat is Fun.

#4 Severely unbalanced as of yet and as far as I can see, maybe it's more balanced in endgame but so far the blue "realm"  with the tentacles is stupidly OP compared to other "realms". You get passive damage and passive defense at the same time that's severly overtuned.

#5 Too many currencies, I wish they'd learn we don't need 20 types of skill and exp currencies, 20 types of shop currencies, etc. It's just anti-consumer abstracting ♥♥♥♥ that could be simplified and give a better player experience. I KNOW why they do it, I just wish they didn't hold a sign in my face saying "We think you're stupid" all the time, turns me off and prevents me from spending.

#6 They give away 3 free 5 star selectors after like 1, 3 and 7 day logins at the start so you can make a good basic team that will torch the story mode.

#7 Chat GPT english translation, since it's from a small Korean Studio. Sometimes it's ok, other times it's awful. The story overall is ok if you enjoy dark/ghost/eldritch themes.

It's good but I will probably bounce off once I clear the story because, unless a miracle happens, I can already see it turning into a money check / HP inflated bosses endgame. I'd like to be proven wrong.
